documentation.text:
@title MockRUSD
 @dev Minimal ERC-20 mock for testing Token42Messaging.

@title IERC20
 @dev Minimal ERC-20 interface for rUSD interaction.

@title Token42Messaging
 @dev Staked messaging with AI-verified matches and anti-spam slashing.
      Minimal implementation — no OpenZeppelin.
 Key features:
   - Senders stake rUSD to message (anti-spam)
   - AI Agent signs match intent off-chain
   - Recipients claim stakes by replying
   - AI Agent can slash stakes for harassment

typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "Match score too low for staking"

arguments.value: Match score too low for staking

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "Match score too low for staking"

documentation.text:
@dev Stake rUSD to message a recipient.
      Requires a valid ECDSA signature from the AI Agent.
@dev Recipient claims the stake by replying.

@dev Slash a sender's stake for harassment.
      Only the AI Agent (oracle) can trigger this.

@title IIdentity
 @dev Interface for the Polkadot Identity Precompile (0x...901)

@title Token42Profile
 @dev Soulbound profile token for Token42.
      Minimal ERC-721 implementation — no OpenZeppelin.
      Keeps bytecode under PolkaVM's 100KB limit.
 Key features:
   - One profile per verified human (Identity Precompile check)
   - Non-transferable (soulbound)
   - IPFS CID storage for profile metadata
